title: Rich & Creamy Spanish Cheese Filo
description: A rich and creamy Spanish cheese filo dish perfect for a weeknight meal featuring the warmth of steamed flaky filo pastry combined with tangy goat cheese, mild Manchego, and aromatic herbs.
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt, crumbled goat cheese, grated Manchego, fresh herbs, and flour until well combined. Stir in water and olive oil.
Cut filo pastry sheets into 4-inch squares. Arrange on a parchment-lined baking sheet with the edges trimmed off.
Gently spread the cheese mixture over each square of filo, leaving about an inch border around the edges.
Fold corners inward, then fold one long side toward center to create a pouch shape. Brush top and sides lightly with water for easy peeling later.
Place in preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and puffed up slightly.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
